strategy.name: EMA 50/200 + RSI(14) + MACD Swing Strategy
strategy.description: Three indicators each doing a different job. EMA 50/200 for macro trend, RSI(14) for momentum and avoiding overbought/oversold extremes, MACD for entry confirmation. All three must align before a trade fires. Designed for 4H candles on BTC futures.

indicators.ema_50: Medium-term trend. Price above EMA(50) = bullish structure. Below = bearish.
indicators.ema_200: Macro trend. Price above EMA(200) = bull market. Below = bear market. Most important filter.
indicators.rsi_14: Momentum. Above 50 = bullish momentum. Below 50 = bearish. Avoid longs above 70 (overbought). Avoid shorts below 30 (oversold).
indicators.macd: Entry timing. MACD line crossing above signal line = bullish confirmation. Crossing below = bearish confirmation. Histogram growing = momentum building.

long: Price is above EMA(200) — macro trend is bullish
Price is above EMA(50) — medium-term structure is bullish
RSI(14) is between 50 and 70 — bullish momentum without being overbought
MACD line has crossed above the signal line — bullish confirmation
MACD histogram is positive and growing — momentum is building
short: Price is below EMA(200) — macro trend is bearish
Price is below EMA(50) — medium-term structure is bearish
RSI(14) is between 30 and 50 — bearish momentum without being oversold
MACD line has crossed below the signal line — bearish confirmation
MACD histogram is negative and growing — downside momentum is building

exit_rules: Take profit when RSI(14) reaches 70 (longs) or 30 (shorts) — momentum exhaustion
Exit long if price closes below EMA(50) on 4H candle
Exit short if price closes above EMA(50) on 4H candle
Hard stop loss: 2% below entry for longs, 2% above entry for shorts
Trailing stop: move stop to breakeven once trade is 1.5% in profit
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Do not enter a trade if MACD crossover happened more than 2 candles ago — entry is late
Do not trade if RSI(14) is above 70 (longs) or below 30 (shorts) — avoid chasing extremes
Do not open a new position if one is already open
Paper trade first — validate this strategy before going live
notes: Swing strategy designed for 4H BTC futures. Cron should run every 4 hours aligned with candle close: 0 */4 * * *. EMA(200) is the most important filter — never go long in a bear market or short in a bull market. MACD crossover is the trigger, EMAs and RSI are the filter.
